title: pyrus × lecontei
intro: Pyrus × lecontei, also known as the LeConte's pyrus, is a hybrid tree species that is a cross between Pyrus communis and Pyrus serotina. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Pyrus × lecontei include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various ailments such as fever, pain, and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve the bark being dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a topical ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
